creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Looks like only 
HelpOnEditing
HelpOnFormatting
HelpOnParsers
are available on the wiki. All other Help* that are linked from HelpOnEditing give a "Create New Page"

Requires me to jump to MoinMoin for these pages, would be helpful to my workflow to make them available on FreeBSD wiki as well!

Thanks for the great work!
